arts.ttl: 'That's not how it works...' BBC pundit fires shots at Philippe Clement with Celtic message
arts.sum: Stephen McGinn fires shots at Philippe Clement after Celtic open up a 13-point lead over Rangers Clement put a lot into that Celtic match, including resting key players in the build-up to the match before the New Year – games in which Rangers dropped points in.

arts.ttl: Celtic 'thank' the fans with brilliant gesture vs Dundee United
arts.sum: The other big headline that overshadowed the result was the Celtic Park power outage that affected VAR and the live TV broadcast from inside the stadium. The momentary power cut caused the Celtic TV broadcast to go down and to make it up to the fans, the club have delivered a brilliant gesture to the Hoops support.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee United PPV price slashed in 'goodwill gesture' after power cut issue
arts.sum: Celtic have slashed the price of a pay-per-view pass for their match against Dundee United after a power cut impacted the stream of the win over St Mirren.

arts.ttl: Celtic legend name-checked during Inter vs AC Milan derby in cup final
arts.sum: Celtic legend Scott Brown was name-checked in commentary of last night's cup final derby between Inter and AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans' verdict on Brendan Rodgers' post-match St Mirren criticism as some agree with one point made
arts.sum: The Celtic boss also criticised the Parkhead support for singing about former hero Kieran Tierney as speculation surrounding a return to the Bhoys continues to ramp up citing the signing as ‘disrespect’ to current fullback, Greg Taylor . The comments have certainly caused a debate amongst the Celtic supporters with one fan replying, “Any fan that watched Zagreb, Dundee Utd and the Rangers game knows we haven’t been at our flowing football for a while now consistently.

arts.ttl: Jota out of love as his illuminating Celtic claim rings louder than ever amid strained Rennes relationship
arts.sum: Few players have copped less flak than what the mercurial winger suffered when he swapped Parkhead for Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: 'Unfair'... Chris Sutton slams English media using a 'poke at Celtic' to criticise Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Sutton has found himself defending Celtic even more ever since Ange Postecoglou left to join Spurs as the former Hoops gaffer comes under some serious criticism this season for the Premier League side’s form. Chris Sutton defends Celtic as Ange Postecoglou comes under pressure at Spurs

arts.ttl: 5 Rangers transfer game changers as former Celtic star, Ibrox panto villain and legendary boyhood fan fit the bill
arts.sum: Philippe Clement is fighting an injury crisis and a title hero or another Scotland star could help provide a solution

First meets third, as Celtic and Dundee United go head-to-head at Parkhead in one of two Scottish Premiership fixtures taking place on Wednesday night. Celtic have lost just one of their last 73 Scot...

arts.ttl: Celtic announce PPV price slash for Dundee United as club react to fan pleas over St Mirren power outage
arts.sum: The price has been cut after Sunday's game was beset by technical issues after an issue in Glasgow's east end
